build.script:
set -euo pipefail
cd lambda
whoami
id
if ! docker info >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Docker daemon not running; start Docker Desktop or colima" >&2; exit 1; fi
if ! docker pull -q swift:amazonlinux2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Cannot pull swift:amazonlinux2 (check Docker permissions/daemon)" >&2; exit 1; fi
swift build -c release
swift package archive --product TorpinServiceLambda --allow-writing-to-directory .build -c release
swift package archive --product EventHandlerLambda --allow-writing-to-directory .build -c release
cd ../cdk
npm run build

clean.script:
cd lambda
swift package clean
cd ../cdk
npm run clean
